title: Black Jack
summary: Casino blackjack vs the house. Stake 100, fixed bet 10, natural pays 3:2, dealer stands on all 17s. Bust the bank (200) to WIN; run out of chips and the house takes the game.
notes: Deck shuffled per hand by a Lehmer LCG seeded from hand number + chips (deterministic). MOVE with INPUT omitted = engine plays the player (DEAL, hit below 17).
author: core
